productDisplayName: Undercolors of Benetton Men Blue Tanga Brief
description: Revel in the comfort of soft cotton with this low-rise tanga cut bikini brief from undercolors of benetton. Crafted from a quick dry fabric, the tanga cut of this brief allows free leg movement, while the printed label offers abrasion-free comfort. Crafted from 95% cotton and 5% elastane Broad and stretchable waistband in contrast colour that sits snug and comfortably Printed brand label on the front of the waistband for abrasion-free comfort Wash care Machine wash delicate at 30 degrees Do not bleach or dry clean Flat dry in shade Cool iron if needed Model statistics Product is a size M on a model with waist 34" and hips 38"
